on_screen_text: Pallavi: Happy with your English? Me: I can read and write. Pallavi: What about speaking? Me: Light, light! Pallavi: Nervous to speak? Me: Yeahhh!! Pallavi: Have you tried any courses? Me: Yeahhh!! Pallavi: What about AI training? Me: AI? Pallavi: AI Teacher makes you speak English faster than other methods. It's very useful. Me: How to join? Pallavi: Install MySivi. The ARYA AI provides personalized training based on your level. You'll learn to speak English faster than you think. Me: Can't believe! Pallavi: 50 lakh + learners are using the app. Join MySivi Pro and start your AI Training.
summary: A simulated chat conversation highlights the struggle of being able to read and write English but fearing speaking. The contact recommends MySivi, an app featuring an AI teacher named ARYA for personalized speaking practice. The ad ends with a call to action to join MySivi Pro, citing over 50 lakh users.
